subject: URGENT: Production database is down
body:
Hey,

The production Postgres cluster went offline at 03:12 UTC. All services returning 500s. We need the on-call DBA to restore from the latest snapshot ASAP. Customer-facing impact confirmed.

Please acknowledge and give an ETA for recovery.

— Marcus, CTO

subject: Re: URGENT: Production database is down
body:
Marcus,

I'm on it. Snapshot restore initiated — ETA ~25 minutes. Will switch traffic to the read replica in the meantime to restore partial service.

Will update in 15.

— Priya

subject: Q1 deliverables timeline
body:
Hi,

Could you share an updated timeline for the Q1 deliverables? Our board meeting is March 5 and I need to present progress. Specifically interested in:

1. API v2 migration status
2. Dashboard redesign
3. Mobile app beta date

Thanks,
Sarah Chen
VP Product, ClientCo

subject: Office closed Monday Feb 23 — Presidents' Day
body:
Hi team,

Just a reminder that the office will be closed on Monday, February 23 for Presidents' Day. Enjoy the long weekend!

If you have any PTO questions, reach out to HR.

Best,
HR Team

subject: 🚀 This Week in AI: GPT-5 rumors, new robotics breakthroughs
body:
TECH DIGEST WEEKLY — Feb 17, 2026

📰 TOP STORIES

1. GPT-5 Training Reportedly Complete
Sources close to OpenAI suggest GPT-5 has finished training and is entering safety evaluation. Expected capabilities include...

2. Boston Dynamics Announces Household Robot
The Atlas-Home platform will retail at $24,999 and handle basic household tasks...

3. EU AI Act Enforcement Begins
First penalties issued under the EU AI Act, targeting non-compliant facial recognition systems...

— Unsubscribe: https://techdigest.com/unsub

subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You've Won $4,500,000
body:
Dear Beloved,

I am Prince Abubakar of Nigeria. My late father left $4,500,000 in a security vault and I need a trusted foreign partner to help transfer the funds. You will receive 30% ($1,350,000) for your assistance.

Please send your full name, address, bank account number, and a copy of your passport to proceed.

God bless,
Prince Abubakar

subject: Invoice #2847 — Feb design work
body:
Hi,

Please find attached Invoice #2847 for February design work:

- Landing page redesign: $3,200
- Icon set (48 icons): $1,800
- Brand guide updates: $900

Total: $5,900
Due: March 1, 2026

Payment via ACH to the account on file. Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Mike Torres
Design Studio Co.

subject: [JIRA] ACME-1234 moved to Code Review
body:
Priya Sharma moved ACME-1234 "Implement rate limiting middleware" to Code Review.

Assignee: You
Priority: High
Sprint: Sprint 24

Please review the PR at https://github.com/acmecorp/api/pull/567

— Jira Bot

subject: Lunch tomorrow?
body:
Hey!

Want to grab lunch tomorrow? Thinking that new ramen place on 5th. I heard their tonkotsu is incredible.

Let me know!
— Alex

subject: Dependabot alert: critical vulnerability in lodash < 4.17.21
body:
A critical severity vulnerability was found in lodash (npm) used by acmecorp/dashboard.

Vulnerability: Prototype Pollution
Severity: Critical (CVSS 9.8)
Affected: lodash < 4.17.21
Fix: Upgrade to lodash >= 4.17.21

View alert: https://github.com/acmecorp/dashboard/security/dependabot/1

— GitHub Security
